identity: Dwarven male runesmith, stocky powerful build, thick braided red beard reaching mid-chest with gold rings, bushy red eyebrows, ruddy skin, a leather eye-patch over one eye.
outfit: Heavy forge-blackened plate armor with brass runes etched across the breastplate, thick leather smith's apron over the plate, wide leather belt with a rune-engraved buckle, iron boots. A small anvil-charm on a chain around the neck.
weapons: A large two-handed warhammer with glowing orange runes etched along the head, held in both hands.
attackStyle: East-facing. Warhammer swung in a downward overhead strike, glowing orange runes on the head trailing sparks.
spellStyle: East-facing. Warhammer planted head-down, free hand raised with a spinning glowing-orange rune-sigil in the air.
blockStyle: East-facing. Warhammer held horizontally in both hands as a guard across the chest, beard forward.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on both knees, warhammer dropped beside him, beard splayed forward.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), sturdy idle. Warhammer head-down at his feet, both hands on the haft. Gold-ringed red beard.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Thick braided red beard with gold rings, eye-patch, forge-blackened plate + smith apron.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Dwarven male runesmith, stocky powerful build, thick braided red beard reaching mid-chest with gold rings, bushy red eyebrows, ruddy skin, a leather eye-patch over one eye.

OUTFIT: Heavy forge-blackened plate armor with brass runes etched across the breastplate, thick leather smith's apron over the plate, wide leather belt with a rune-engraved buckle, iron boots. A small anvil-charm on a chain around the neck.

WEAPONS: A large two-handed warhammer with glowing orange runes etched along the head, held in both hands.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Dwarven male runesmith, stocky powerful build, thick braided red beard reaching mid-chest with gold rings, bushy red eyebrows, ruddy skin, a leather eye-patch over one eye.

OUTFIT: Heavy forge-blackened plate armor with brass runes etched across the breastplate, thick leather smith's apron over the plate, wide leather belt with a rune-engraved buckle, iron boots. A small anvil-charm on a chain around the neck.

WEAPONS: A large two-handed warhammer with glowing orange runes etched along the head, held in both hands.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Thick braided red beard with gold rings, eye-patch, forge-blackened plate + smith apron.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
